title: Intense Venezuelan Avocado Salad
description: A grassy, crunchy salad bursting with roasted corn, black beans, and a smoky tadka, topped with creamy avocado pulp and crumbled queso fresco.

ingredients.name: black beans
ingredients.amount: 1 cup cooked black beans, drained and rinsed

ingredients.name: tadka mixture
ingredients.amount: 1 tsp cumin seeds, 1 tsp coriander powder, 1/2 tsp smoked chili powder, 1/4 tsp garlic powder

instructions: Mash the avocado pulp in a bowl until smooth but slightly chunky.
Heat 1 tsp oil over medium heat in a small pan and add the cumin seeds, cooking until they sputter.
Add the coriander powder, smoked chili powder, and garlic powder; stir for 30 seconds to release aromas.
Pour the tadka over the mashed avocado and stir to combine.
Add the roasted corn kernels, black beans, diced red onion, and chopped cilantro; toss gently.
Drizzle 2 tbsp olive oil, squeeze fresh lime juice, and sprinkle seasoning; mix thoroughly.
Fold in the crumbled queso fresco, ensuring even distribution.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
